heading: Conduct of hearings and investigations pursuant tosection 161 of title 29
label: 2000e–9 Conduct of hearings and investigations pursuant tosection 161 of title 29
text: For the purpose of all hearings and investigations conducted by the Commission or its duly authorized agents or agencies, shall apply.section 161 of title 29
notes: Amendments1972— substituted provisions making applicable to all hearings and investigations conducted by the Commission or its authorized agents or agencies, for provisions enumerating the investigatory powers of the Commission and the procedure for their enforcement.Pub. L. 92–261section 161 of title 29
amendments: Amendments1972— substituted provisions making applicable to all hearings and investigations conducted by the Commission or its authorized agents or agencies, for provisions enumerating the investigatory powers of the Commission and the procedure for their enforcement.Pub.
